title: Microsoft is a great company to work for. In fact, it does not need my or anyone's recommendation. I
pros: Microsoft is a great company to work for. In fact, it does not need my or anyone's recommendation. It's kind of small Silicon Valley - you have all possible choices within the company. The company culture is great, people are very talented. As a downside I'd mention too many re-orgs happened recently, but this is probably the nature of today's dynamic world and market. I enjoyed working in Microsoft, think the experience gained there will help me a lot in other projects in my career.

I have worked as a Developer for around 7 years with technology stack that includes C#, ASP.Net, MVC, Angular,  SQL etc.

From last 3 years, I am working as a Customer Facing Engineer in Microsoft for  Azure PAAS Products.

title: I love working at Microsoft. Great culture and learning. I worked with some of the smartest people i
pros: I love working at Microsoft. Great culture and learning. I worked with some of the smartest people in Industry

title: Moving due to needing to relocate. Other than that, Microsoft has been a great company to work for,
pros: Moving due to needing to relocate. Other than that, Microsoft has been a great company to work for, with great opportunities and a work-life balance. It is a huge company, so be prepared to have a completely different experience depending on your team and manager. You own your career, and moving internally is easy if you are having good performance.

title: Pretty good Work-Life Balance and a good culture overall. Compensation is a bit lacking.
pros: Pretty good Work-Life Balance and a good culture overall. Compensation is a bit lacking.

pros: The experience at the company was great, I have established many relationships with either co workers or managers. With those, I was able to get references and get started on propelling towards the right direction in my career.
